items.title: Picking the dominant term
items.mermaid:
flowchart LR T["T(n) = 3n² + 100n + 5000"] T --> A["drop the constant 5000"] A --> B["drop the lower-order 100n
(small vs n² for big n)"] B --> C["drop the coefficient 3"] C --> D["O(n²)"]
items.caption: Big-O keeps only the dominant term and drops constants — what's left tells you the scaling class.
